draft_prompts.experiment_designer: Design a set of experiments to replicate the results from 'Bridging Data Gaps in Diffusion Models with Adversarial Noise-Based Transfer Learning', focusing on the implementation described in Section 5.
draft_prompts.code_generator: Write the necessary code to implement Algorithm 1 for training DPMs with Adversarial Noise-based Transfer, as described in the paper.
draft_prompts.data_discovery: Identify and evaluate the necessary data sources to support the replication of the results from 'Bridging Data Gaps in Diffusion Models with Adversarial Noise-Based Transfer Learning'.
draft_prompts.review: Review the code generated to implement Algorithm 1 for training DPMs with Adversarial Noise-based Transfer, ensuring it meets the requirements and standards of the original paper.
